subcodes.first_line: O thou true servant of the Lord! The written page possessed a wondrous theme, and a delicate meaning in praise of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق پروردگار ورق محرر مضمون بدیعی داشت و مفهوم لطیفی ستایش خداوند
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
